title: AI Builds Its Own Solar Cell - TCR 04/15/26
description:
An autonomous closed-loop AI system published in Nature discovered a novel molecule and fabricated perovskite solar cells at 27.22% efficiency with five times the reproducibility of manual fabrication as JPMorgan confirmed Mythos testing and Anthropic publicly opposed OpenAI's AI liability shield bill.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-april-15-2026/

A Nature paper described an autonomous framework that used machine learning to discover a passivation molecule no human researcher had identified, then fabricated perovskite solar cells using robotic manufacturing with Bayesian optimization in a continuous feedback loop - achieving 27.22% efficiency and five times the reproducibility of manual fabrication without human intervention. JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon confirmed the bank is testing Claude Mythos, the third named major bank disclosure in a week, and stated that AI creates additional vulnerabilities across interconnected financial infrastructure. The UK AI Security Institute published its independent evaluation confirming Mythos is the first system to complete a 32-step autonomous cyberattack simulation. Anthropic publicly opposed Illinois SB 3444, which OpenAI backed, calling the liability shield "a get-out-of-jail-free card" while the governor's office said companies should never receive full immunity from accountability. A Guardian investigation and Stanford-affiliated study documented "workslop" - AI-generated output requiring more correction than the original work would have demanded - with 40% of non-managers reporting AI saves them no time. Stegra secured €1.4 billion to complete the world's first major green-steel mill using green hydrogen to cut steelmaking emissions by up to 95%.

Read the full edition: https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-april-15-2026/

Additional Reading:
- Nature - Autonomous Closed-Loop Framework for Reproducible Perovskite Solar Cells: https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-026-10482-y
- CNBC - Jamie Dimon Says Anthropic's Mythos Reveals 'A Lot More Vulnerabilities': https://www.cnbc.com/2026/04/14/jamie-dimon-anthropic-mythos-vulnerabilities-cyber-attacks.html
- Wired - Anthropic Opposes the Extreme AI Liability Bill That OpenAI Backed: https://www.wired.com/story/anthropic-opposes-the-extreme-ai-liability-bill-that-openai-backed/
- The Guardian - Bosses Say AI Boosts Productivity - Workers Say They're Drowning in 'Workslop': https://www.theguardian.com/technology/2026/apr/14/ai-productivity-workplace-errors
- Shared Sapience - The Century Report April 14, 2026 (Goldman Sachs Mythos Disclosure): https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-april-14-2026/
